top_signals.title: Mexico’s Fibra MTY to Buy Fibra Macquarie in $1.7 Billion Deal
top_signals.summary: Mexican real estate investment trust Fibra MTY said it’s acquiring peer Fibra Macquarie after the latter’s shareholders backed the transaction.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
